title: Principal Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Bosch India Software Digital Technologies:
Bosch India Software Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software Digital Technologies!
